AiDemo.description: No drop-downs, no date pickers. Just type what you need to do, and Karsa's AI handles the rest.

Feature.subtitle: Karsa replaces your scattered to-do apps, calendars, and note-taking tools with one unified, calm workspace.
Feature.card1_desc: Connect your daily tasks to your highest-level goals. Attach meeting notes, documents, and milestones directly to your project space so context is always one click away.
Feature.card2_desc: Start every day with clarity. Karsa analyzes your backlog, deadlines, and past productivity to generate an optimal daily schedule tailored just for you.

HowItWorks.subtitle: We designed Karsa to get out of your way. Spend less time organizing, and more time doing what matters.
HowItWorks.step1_desc: Just type what's on your mind. Don't worry about dates, tags, or projects. Let it all out in natural language.
HowItWorks.step2_desc: Our AI instantly understands intent. It extracts deadlines, assigns priorities, and places it in your optimal schedule.
HowItWorks.step3_desc: Wake up to a perfectly planned day. Tick off tasks with zero friction and watch your productivity score soar.

Faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the product and billing.
Faq.q1: How is Karsa different from other task managers?
Faq.a1: Karsa uses advanced AI to understand your natural language intent. Instead of manually filling out due dates, priorities, and tags, you just type what's on your mind and Karsa structures it for you automatically.
Faq.q2: Can I use Karsa for my team?
Faq.a2: Currently, Karsa is optimized for individual productivity and deep work. However, we are actively developing team collaboration features which will be available in our upcoming Enterprise plan.
Faq.q3: Do I have to pay to use Karsa?
Faq.a3: Currently, Karsa is completely free to use! Since we are in the early stages, all features are available at no cost, though AI requests may be subject to fair use limits to ensure stability for everyone.
Faq.a4: Yes. We take privacy seriously. All your data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never use your personal tasks to train public AI models.

Cta.subtitle: Plan, organize, and execute your daily tasks effortlessly.

AuthCarousel.slide1_desc: Karsa helps you manage your projects, tasks, and energy in one peaceful dashboard.
AuthCarousel.slide2_desc: Keep all your notes, ideas, and meeting summaries in one clutter-free space.
AuthCarousel.slide3_desc: Set your daily priorities and let Karsa guide you to achieve them without burnout.
AuthCarousel.slide4_desc: Get smart suggestions to balance your workload and maintain your well-being.

Auth.branding_subtitle: Karsa helps you manage your projects, tasks, and energy in one peaceful dashboard. Focus on what truly matters.
Auth.login_subtitle: Log in to your account to continue.
Auth.register_subtitle: Enter your details to get started with Karsa.
Auth.error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
Auth.error_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
Auth.error_name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
Auth.logout_confirm_desc: Your session will be ended and you will need to log in again later.

Footer.description: Your go-to platform for intelligent workspace tools and daily planning insights.

Assistant.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? This action cannot be undone.
